items.question: How does text turn into audio?
items.answer: Prompts are read for action, character, timing, and acoustic hints. Models synthesize waveforms that fit the brief, then light processing steadies dynamics. Tweak a few words, regenerate, and A/B takes against your timeline. Researchers typing sound effects funny into search want comedy-first filters without thriller noise.

items.question: How should I write prompts?
items.answer: Lead with the joke beat (slip, rimshot, record scratch), add setting (tight room vs. arena), and note duration ("one-second sting"). Compare concrete lines like "rubber stretch pop" with broader moods and refine from listener feedback. Mention sound effects funny sting in prompts to bias the model toward comedic transients.
